Privacy Policy

Mikahs Auto Detailing and Services LLC (d/b/a Mikah's Auto Detailing) · Last Updated: June 28, 2026

Introduction

Mikahs Auto Detailing and Services LLC ("Mikah's Auto Detailing," "we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.

What Information We Collect

Information you provide

  • Name
  • Phone number
  • Email address
  • Service address / location
  • Vehicle information
  • Details about the service you request

Information collected automatically

  • IP address, browser type, and device/operating system information
  • Referring website and pages visited
  • Approximate geographic location

How We Use Your Information

  • Provide, schedule, and perform our auto detailing services
  • Respond to quote requests and customer service inquiries
  • Send appointment confirmations, reminders, and service updates
  • Send promotional offers where you have consented
  • Improve our website and services and prevent fraud
  • Comply with legal obligations

Text Messaging (SMS) Opt-In

By providing your mobile phone number and checking an SMS consent box on our booking, quote, or contact forms, you consent to receive text messages from Mikah's Auto Detailing. We offer separate consent for (1) transactional messages such as appointment confirmations and service updates, and (2) marketing and promotional messages.

  • Message frequency varies based on your interactions with us.
  • Message and data rates may apply.
  • Reply STOP at any time to opt out. Reply HELP for help, or call/text (803) 667-8731.
  • Consent to receive text messages is not a condition of purchasing any goods or services.

No sharing of SMS opt-in data: We do not sell, rent, or share your mobile phone number or SMS opt-in/consent information with any third parties or affiliates for their own marketing or promotional purposes. Mobile information and SMS consent are not shared with third parties, except with the messaging service providers that help us deliver the messages you request, and only as needed to provide that service. No mobile information will be shared with third parties or affiliates for marketing or promotional purposes.

How We Share Your Information

Aside from the SMS data described above (which is not shared for marketing), we may share information with service providers who perform functions on our behalf (such as payment processing or scheduling), when required by law, in connection with a business transfer, or with your consent.

Cookies and Tracking Technologies

We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to operate and improve our website and understand how it is used. You can set your browser to refuse cookies, though some features of the site may not function properly without them.

Data Security

We use administrative, technical, and physical safeguards designed to protect your personal information. No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, but we work to protect your information using industry-standard measures.

Your Rights and Choices

  • Access, update, or correct your personal information
  • Request deletion of your personal information
  • Opt out of marketing emails via the unsubscribe link, and out of marketing texts by replying STOP
  • California and other state-law rights, including the right to know, delete, and opt out of the sale of personal information (we do not sell personal information)

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at (803) 667-8731 or mikahsautodetailing@gmail.com.

Children's Privacy

Our services are not directed to individuals under 18, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from anyone under 18.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes are effective when posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date.

Contact Us

Mikahs Auto Detailing and Services LLC
Lexington, SC 29072
Phone/Text: (803) 667-8731
Email: mikahsautodetailing@gmail.com
